allow: Bash(bash -c 'echo "=== PACKAGE ==="; test -f package.json && grep -oE "\\"\(stream-chat-react-native|stream-chat-expo|@stream-io/video-react-native-sdk|@stream-io/feeds-react-native-sdk|@stream-io/react-native-webrtc|@stream-io/react-native-callingx|react-native|expo|@react-navigation/[^\\"]+|expo-router|react-native-reanimated|react-native-worklets|react-native-teleport|@op-engineering/op-sqlite\)\\": *\\"[^\\"]*\\"" package.json 2>/dev/null; echo "=== EXPO ==="; find . -maxdepth 2 \\\( -name "app.json" -o -name "app.config.js" -o -name "app.config.ts" -o -path "./app/_layout.*" \\\) -print 2>/dev/null; echo "=== NATIVE ==="; find . -maxdepth 2 \\\( -name "ios" -o -name "android" \\\) -type d -print 2>/dev/null; echo "=== CONFIG ==="; find . -maxdepth 2 \\\( -name "babel.config.js" -o -name "metro.config.js" \\\) -print 2>/dev/null; echo "=== EXPO_SDK ==="; node -e "try{console.log\(require\(\\"./node_modules/expo/package.json\\"\).version\)}catch\(e\){try{console.log\(require\(\\"./package.json\\"\).dependencies.expo\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(\\"-\\"\)}}" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== EMPTY ==="; test -z "$\(ls -A 2>/dev/null\)" && echo "EMPTY_CWD" || echo "NON_EMPTY"')
